statement: NVIDIA states its AI demand will contribute $485 billion to U.S. GDP in 2026 and support over 100,000 jobs.
why: A stated $485B GDP contribution from NVIDIA-driven AI demand in 2026 signals the scale and momentum of AI infrastructure demand.

impact.mechanism: Large economy-wide AI demand attributed to NVIDIA chips reflects strong merchant-GPU and cloud AI infrastructure pull.

evidence.excerpt: In 2026 alone, NVIDIA-driven AI demand will contribute $485 billion to the U.S.

confidence.basis: Secondary NVIDIA newsroom press release; company-stated projection, not audited.

dispersion: conflicting same-key reports: magnitude 2 -> 3; sources: DigiTimes, NVIDIA official newsroom press release
